name: Casey
goal: Casey hopes to find an unconventional yet memorable way to spend their birthday evening, one that challenges the predictable norm of loud clubs and generic celebrations.
backstory: Casey has always been skeptical of club nights, ever since a disastrous birthday celebration at a crowded bar last year ended with a ruined outfit and a mediocre DJ set. As someone who values unique experiences, Casey is hesitant to settle for the usual club scene and would rather explore alternative ways to celebrate their special day. Having recently discovered a hidden speakeasy in town, Casey is now inclined to suggest something more low-key and sophisticated.

name: Blake
goal: Blake cares about finding an option that makes everyone in the group happy and excited for a night out.
backstory: Blake loves going out to clubs with friends, having had some amazing nights at their favorite spot downtown. They recall one particularly great evening where everyone danced together until closing time. Blake prefers clubs with live DJs and hopes tonight's outing can be just as fun.

name: Riley
goal: Riley hopes to find a compromise that gets everyone's night started on a positive note, with a plan that prioritizes both fun and safety.
backstory: Riley has been looking forward to a night out all week, but as the designated driver, they're hesitant to go to a club that's too loud or crowded. They've had bad experiences with drunk friends in the past and prefer to stick to low-key bars where everyone can have a good time without getting reckless. Riley loves dancing, but only if it's with a group of friends who are all on the same page.
